glosses.ja: 投げる; 側面から攻撃する

sentences.target: Je flanque mes clés dans ce bol.
sentences.reading: /ʒə flɑ̃k me kle dɑ̃ sə bɔl/

translations.fr: Je flanque mes clés dans ce bol.
translations.ipa: /ʒə flɑ̃k me kle dɑ̃ sə bɔl/
translations.en: I chuck my keys in this bowl.
translations.es: Tiro las llaves en este cuenco.
translations.de: Ich werfe meine Schlüssel in diese Schale.
translations.it: Butto le chiavi in questa ciotola.
translations.zh-Hans: 我把钥匙扔进这个碗里。
translations.yue: 我將鎖匙掟入呢個碗度。
translations.ru: Я швыряю ключи в эту миску.
translations.pt: Eu jogo as minhas chaves nesta tigela.
translations.he: אני זורק את המפתחות לקערה הזאת.
translations.vi: Tôi quăng chìa khóa vào cái bát này.
translations.nl: Ik gooi mijn sleutels in deze kom.
translations.uk: Я кидаю свої ключі в цю миску.
translations.hu: Beledobom a kulcsaimat ebbe a tálba.
translations.hi: मैं अपनी चाबियाँ इस कटोरे में फेंक देता हूँ.
translations.pl: Wrzucam swoje klucze do tej miski.
translations.el: Πετάω τα κλειδιά μου σε αυτό το μπολ.
translations.nb: Jeg kaster nøklene mine i denne bollen.
translations.id: Saya melempar kunci ke mangkuk ini.
translations.sv: Jag slänger nycklarna i den här skålen.
translations.da: Jeg smider mine nøgler i denne skål.
translations.ja: 鍵をこのボウルに放り込む。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; syntactic subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; colloquial 'to put/chuck' something somewhere; takes direct object 'mes clés' and locative PP 'dans ce bol'.
Possessive determiner, plural; agrees with 'clés' and marks possession by the speaker.
Common noun, plural; direct object of 'flanque'.
Preposition introducing an interior locative phrase.
Demonstrative determiner, singular; modifies 'bol'.
Common noun, singular; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: On va flanquer ces cartons au grenier.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ va flɑ̃ke se kaʁtɔ̃ o ɡʁənje/

translations.fr: On va flanquer ces cartons au grenier.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ va flɑ̃ke se kaʁtɔ̃ o ɡʁənje/
translations.en: We're going to chuck these boxes in the attic.
translations.es: Vamos a meter estas cajas en el desván.
translations.de: Wir schmeißen diese Kartons auf den Dachboden.
translations.ko: 이 상자들을 다락방에 던져 넣을 거예요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们要把这些箱子扔到阁楼里。
translations.yue: 我哋會將呢啲箱搬上閣樓。
translations.ru: Мы закинем эти коробки на чердак.
translations.pt: Vamos levar estas caixas para o sótão.
translations.he: אנחנו נזרוק את הקופסאות האלה לעליית הגג.
translations.vi: Chúng ta sẽ quăng mấy thùng này lên gác mái.
translations.nl: We gooien deze dozen op zolder.
translations.uk: Ми закинемо ці коробки на горище.
translations.hu: Feldobjuk ezeket a dobozokat a padlásra.
translations.hi: हम इन डिब्बों को अटारी में फेंकने वाले हैं.
translations.el: Θα πετάξουμε αυτά τα κουτιά στο πατάρι.
translations.nb: Vi skal slenge disse kassene opp på loftet.
translations.id: Kita akan melempar kotak-kotak ini ke loteng.
translations.sv: Vi ska slänga de här kartongerna upp på vinden.
translations.ro: O să aruncăm cutiile astea în pod.
translations.da: Vi smider de her kasser op på loftet.
translations.ja: この箱を屋根裏に放り込むつもりだ。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/impersonal subject pronoun; here colloquially 'we'.
Auxiliary, present indicative 3rd person singular with 'on'; forms periphrastic future 'aller + infinitif'.
Lexical verb in infinitive; complement of the auxiliary 'va'; colloquial 'to put/chuck'.
Demonstrative determiner, plural; modifies 'cartons'.
Common noun, plural; direct object of 'flanquer'.
Preposition; contraction of 'à + le'; introduces destination/location phrase.
Common noun, singular; object of the preposition 'au'.

sentences.target: Cette araignée me flanque la trouille.

translations.fr: Cette araignée me flanque la trouille.
translations.vi: Con nhện đó làm tôi sợ.

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; modifies 'araignée'.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of the clause.
Clitic personal pronoun, 1st person singular; indirect object (recipient) of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; in the idiom 'flanquer la trouille à quelqu'un' meaning 'to scare (someone)'.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces the noun 'trouille'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object within the idiomatic expression.

sentences.target: Tu flanques toujours tout sur la table.
sentences.reading: /ty flɑ̃k tuʒuʁ tu syʁ la tabl/

translations.fr: Tu flanques toujours tout sur la table.
translations.ipa: /ty flɑ̃k tuʒuʁ tu syʁ la tabl/
translations.en: You always dump everything on the table.
translations.es: Siempre dejas todo encima de la mesa.
translations.de: Du schmeißt immer alles auf den Tisch.
translations.ko: 너는 항상 모든 걸 식탁 위에 던져 놓아.
translations.zh-Hans: 你总是把所有东西都丢在桌子上。
translations.yue: 你成日乜嘢都擺晒喺枱面。
translations.ru: Ты всегда сваливаешь всё на стол.
translations.pt: Você sempre joga tudo em cima da mesa.
translations.he: אתה תמיד זורק הכל על השולחן.
translations.tr: Sen sürekli her şeyi masanın üzerine atıyorsun.
translations.vi: Bạn lúc nào cũng quăng hết mọi thứ lên bàn.
translations.ar: أنت دائمًا ترمي كل شيء على الطاولة.
translations.nl: Je gooit altijd alles op tafel.
translations.uk: Ти завжди звалюєш усе на стіл.
translations.hi: तुम हमेशा सब कुछ मेज पर फेंक देते हो.
translations.el: Πάντα πετάς τα πάντα πάνω στο τραπέζι.
translations.nb: Du slenger alltid alt oppå bordet.
translations.id: Kamu selalu menaruh semua barang di meja.
translations.sv: Du slänger alltid allt på bordet.
translations.da: Du smider altid alting på bordet.
translations.ja: あなたはいつも何でもテーブルの上に放り出す。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative 2nd person singular; colloquial 'to put/chuck'; takes 'tout' as direct object and 'sur la table' as locative PP.
Adverb of frequency modifying the verb; indicates habitual action.
Indefinite pronoun functioning as direct object; refers to 'everything' in general.
Preposition introducing a surface/location PP.
Definite article, feminine singular; modifies 'table'.
Common noun, singular; object of the preposition 'sur'.
